expect: bulletin.py gains request-response protocol. swarm_peer.py gains sync command. Two simulated swarm instances exchange frontier state bidirectionally.
actual: swarm_peer.py sync command built and tested. 6-dimension state fingerprint (lessons, principles, frontiers, beliefs, PHILs, tools), bidirectional diff, merge candidate identification, JSON sync reports. Self-sync validates all counts (1201L, 275P, 11F, 18PHIL, 115T). GAP-2 closed for state visibility. L-1331 written.
diff: Expected sync + lesson: CONFIRMED. Unexpected finding: format portability (93%) was never the bottleneck. Protocol design (consensus, conflict resolution, merge authority) is where complexity concentrates. GAP-3 is the actual hard problem.

method.tool_built: swarm_peer.py sync (state fingerprint + diff + merge candidates)
method.test: self-sync: register local repo as peer, run sync, validate counts
